message:
refactor: simplify server lib, expand storage layer, fix coalesce and reservations

Concurrent agent work improving the MCP Agent Mail core:

- mcp-agent-mail-server/lib.rs: major simplification removing 120+ lines
  of redundant server initialization logic, streamlining the startup path
- mcp-agent-mail-storage/lib.rs: expand storage layer with new helper
  methods for batch operations and improved error handling (+91 lines)
- mcp-agent-mail-db/coalesce.rs: refactor message coalescing with
  cleaner iteration and reduced allocations
- mcp-agent-mail-tools/reservations.rs: fix reservation edge case in
  concurrent release handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
